text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I walk into my office one day, only to<n>find...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My shoe divination and my flower<n>divination
techniques both told me it<n>was definitely going to
rain today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe that divine prophecy<n>didn't come
true... This is definitely<n>misfortune at play!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Argh! At this rate, a procession of<n>sumo wrestlers
is going to stop me<n>from crossing the street, or a
sudden<n>gust of wind will have my shrine
offerings sinking to the bottom of a<n>pond!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I do my best to put<n>Matikanefukukitaru at ease,
but her<n>wild imagination ends up throwing her<n>out
of sorts.
